emails.subject: FW: Mt. Jesus Condensate
emails.body: FW: Mt. Jesus Condensate Lynn, I sent this request for payment to Delaine in June. I followed up (via an e-mail I can't find) in July. Delaine replied to my July follow-up saying she was having trouble getting a hold of someone (internally) she needed to talk with. I really would appreciate your calling her! Charlie To: Graham, Charlie

emails.subject: RE: Mt. Jesus Condensate
emails.body: Charlie, I agree we should get payment either way. Gas Logistics is meeting with Oneok on Wednesday on some other matters. Do you want Steve Herber or I to mention this again to Delaine or wait to see what their review says? Thanks. Lynn

emails.subject: RE: Mt. Jesus Condensate
emails.body: RE: Mt. Jesus Condensate Charlie, let me try calling Delaine in the morning and ask her who is next in the chain of command I should visit with on this issue. Let's see what kind of a response I get. If that does not work, then Mike or Shelley may need to call. I will let you know. Thanks. Lynn
